•   To output the results, press the down arrow. Then, you can copy the result and paste it into a Word file.  
•   Alternatively, you can export it as an HTML file or PDF.  

•   Drawback: Regularized Regression (Regularized Regression) in JASP cannot accommodate categorical variables, such as gender, unless dummy codes are used.
